quotes.text: For every minute you are angry you lose sixty seconds of happiness.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Peace comes from within.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: The way to gain a good reputation is to endeavor to be what you desire to appear.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: How good can it get?
quotes.author: Cynthia Sue Larson

quotes.text: Everything we call real is made of things that cannot be regarded as real. If quantum mechanics hasn't profoundly shocked you, you haven't understood it yet.
quotes.author: Niels Bohr

quotes.text: Perseverance - the greater the obstacle, the greater the glory in overcoming it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Perseverance, secret of triumphs.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.text: Great works are performed not by strength but by perseverance.
quotes.author: Samuel Johnson

quotes.text: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Success is almost totally dependent upon drive and persistence.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: Fall down seven times, stand up eight
quotes.author: Japanese Proverb

quotes.text: You may encounter many defeats, but you must not be defeated.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: The brick walls are there for a reason. The brick walls are not there to keep us out. The brick walls are there to give us a chance to show how badly we want something.
quotes.author: Randy Pausch

quotes.text: Courage is not having the strength to go on; it is going on when you don’t have the strength.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: If you are going through hell, keep going.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: If you can't fly then run, if you can't run then walk, if you can't walk then crawl, but whatever you do you have to keep moving forward.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: By perseverance the snail reached the ark.
quotes.author: Charles Spurgeon

quotes.text: Enlightenment isn't a change into something better or more. It's a simple recognition of who we truly are.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The path to enlightenment is not a path at all, it's actually a metaphor for the time it takes for you to allow yourself to be happy with you already are, where you're already at, and what you already have - no matter what.
quotes.author: Mike Dooley

quotes.text: Don't you know yet?  It is your light that lights the worlds.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: You were born with wings, why prefer to crawl through life?
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: Do not feel lonely.  The entire universe is inside you.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: You are not a drop in the ocean.  You are the entire ocean, in a drop.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: Happiness is there for the taking - and the making.
quotes.author: Oprah

quotes.text: To experience peace does not mean that your life is always blissful.  It means that you are capable of tapping into a blissful state of mind amidst the chaos of a normal hectic life.
quotes.author: Jill Bolte Taylor

quotes.text: The best way to get rid of the pain is to feel the pain. And when you feel the pain and go beyond it, you'll see there's a very intense love that is wanting to awaken itself.
quotes.author: Deepak Chopra

quotes.text: So many conditions of happiness are available; more than enough for you to be happy right now. You don't have to run into the future to get more.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Nanh

quotes.text: When we are unable to find tranquility within ourselves, it is useless to seek it elsewhere.
quotes.author: La Rochefoucauld

quotes.text: The greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.text: Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world.  Indeed, it is the only thing that ever has.
quotes.author: Margaret Mead

quotes.text: Instead of thinking outside the box, get rid of the box
quotes.author: Deepak Chopra

quotes.text: Be who you are and say what you feel because those who mind don't matter and those who matter don't mind
quotes.author: Dr Seuss

quotes.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Be happy for no reason, like a child. If you happy for a reason, you're in trouble, because that reason can be taken from you.
quotes.author: Deepak Chopra

quotes.text: Begin challenging your own assumptions. You assumptions are your windows on the world. Scrub them off every once in a while, or the light won't come in.
quotes.author: Alan Alda

quotes.text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: Life loves to be taken by the lapels and told, I am with you kid, let's go.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: When you are inspired by some great purpose, some extraordinary project, all your thoughts break their bonds: your mind transcends limitations, your consciousness expands in every direction, and you find yourself in a new, great, and wonderful world. Dormant forces, faculties, and talents become alive, and you discover yourself to be a greater person by far than you ever dreamed yourself to be.
quotes.author: Patanjali

quotes.text: I have just three things to teach: simplicity, patience, compassion. These three are your greatest treasures.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: If you are depressed, you live in the past...If you are anxious, you live in the future...But, if you are at peace, you live in the present.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Doing nothing is better than being busy doing nothing.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Watch your thoughts; they become words. Watch your words; they become actions. Watch your actions; they become habits. Watch your habits; they become character. Watch your character; it becomes your destiny
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: If you do not change direction, you may end up where you are heading.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Care about what other people think and you will always be their prisoner.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: New beginnings are often disguised as painful endings.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: If you want to awaken all of humanity, then awaken all of yourself. If you want to eliminate suffering in the world, then eliminate all that is dark and negative in yourself. Truly, the greatest gift you have to give is that of your own self-transformation.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Be content with what you have, rejoice in the way things are. When you realize there is nothing lacking, the whole world belongs to you.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

reflections: What part of this speaks to me right now?
Where could I apply this today?
What would it feel like to live this fully?
What is one small step I can take from this?
How can I make my daily life easier and nicer for myself?
What thoughts, beliefs or patterns can I let go of?
What do I want less of in my life?
What do I want more of in my life?
What gave me energy over the past week?
What took away my energy over the past week?
What do I want to learn?
Am I spending my time the way I want to spend it?
What is holding me back from living the life I want to live?
In what areas am I underestimating myself?
What were my greatest moments this week?
What is missing in my life and how can I get that?
What mistakes have I made? What have I learned from them?
How will I approach things differently in the future?
What is important to me in life? Am I organizing my life accordingly?
What is the best advice I've received?
What do I want to do differently?
What advice would I give someone younger?
What makes me smile?
What makes life meaningful for me?
Are there any beliefs I've outgrown but still hold onto out of habit?
What went well today?
What am I grateful for?
What emotions did I experience most strongly today?
What is my intention today?
